description: As a municipal GIS analyst, prepare a terrain visualization for a city council presentation using the SRTM DEM file (/home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif). Apply a non-grayscale graduated terrain/topography color palette to the elevation band. Save the processed product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/dem_colored.dim and export the colored visualization as a Google Earth KMZ file to /home/ga/snap_exports/dem_terrain.kmz.
